edges.claim: Matt Clifford is the anchor person for this graph: commissioned to devise the AI Opportunities Action Plan and later tied to the PM adviser implementation layer.
The AI Opportunities Action Plan is the policy object through which the Clifford policy machine is measured.
GOV.UK says Peter Kyle appointed Matt Clifford to deliver the AI Opportunities Action Plan.
DSIT announced Matt Clifford was appointed to kickstart work on the Action Plan.
DSIT and HM Treasury announced the AI Opportunities Unit to pool expertise and implement Action Plan proposals.
The AI Opportunities Unit is described as the implementation expertise pool for Action Plan proposals.
Reuters reported the government would implement the 50 recommendations from Clifford’s AI Opportunities Action Plan.
The Starmer adoption layer is the political implementation face of the Clifford policy machine.
10 Downing Street is the political control node for PM adviser and adoption-layer implementation.
The Action Plan says the Digital Centre of Government will drive technological transformation of the state.
The Action Plan treats the National Data Library as a mechanism for high-impact public datasets for AI.
The Action Plan recommends AI Growth Zones to accelerate AI data centre buildout.
The Action Plan recommends expanding the AI Research Resource by at least 20x by 2030.
The Action Plan recommends creating UK Sovereign AI with power to partner with the private sector.
The Action Plan identifies the AI Safety Institute as part of the UK’s AI governance foundation.
The Frontier AI Taskforce is included as a precursor institution in the Clifford policy timeline.
Matt Clifford co-founded Entrepreneur First.
Matt Clifford is associated with Code First Girls in public profiles.
Matt Clifford has been reported as chair of ARIA.
The provided Dialog directory extract lists Matt Clifford as PM’s Advisor on AI Opportunities, UK Government, and co-founder of Entrepreneur First.
